name: Adversarial Machine Learning: A Taxonomy and Terminology of Attacks and Mitigations
owner: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
description: NIST AI 100-4 (2024) extends the AI 100-2 adversarial ML taxonomy to cover generative AI systems specifically. Defines attack categories (evasion, poisoning, privacy, abuse) and mitigation patterns for GenAI.
relationToCloudSecurity: Cloud-hosted GenAI services (Azure OpenAI, AWS Bedrock, Vertex AI) inherit the AI 100-4 threat landscape.
relationToAISecurity: Direct AI-security taxonomy for GenAI threats.

license.notes: Work of NIST is in the US public domain (17 USC §105).

lifecycle.notes: Initial Public Draft 2024-07-25. Companion to existing AI 100-2 (Adversarial ML).

current_extraction.notes: Metadata-only stub. Source PDF acquisition + extraction is TODO.

notes: Metadata stub; acquire from NIST CSRC and extract.
